# WeHopinn

> WeHopinn helps students in Islamabad, Pakistan find trusted, personally
> verified accommodation without the stress of endless searching. Students
> share a few details and WeHopinn shortlists suitable, verified options —
> free during the current MVP phase — typically within 24 hours.

WeHopinn is a student accommodation matching service. It is currently launching
in Islamabad and focuses on students at local universities (NUST, COMSATS,
FAST-NU, Air University, QAU, IIUI, Bahria University, SZABIST). Every
recommendation is personally verified through in-person visits before being
shortlisted. Parents can also submit requests on behalf of their children.

## How it works

- Tell us about yourself: university, campus, program, home city, and preferences.
- We search and verify: options are personally reviewed and inspected on the ground.
- Receive a shortlist within 24 hours matched to your needs and budget.

## Key facts

- Service area: Islamabad, Pakistan (expanding to more areas over time).
- Audience: university students and their parents.
- Cost: free for students during the MVP phase.
- Verification: accommodations are visited and verified in person before recommendation.
- Response time: shortlist typically delivered within 24 hours.
- Contact: hello@wehopinn.com, WhatsApp +923037279436
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/wehopinn.official

## Pages

- [Home](https://wehopinn.com): Overview, how it works, why WeHopinn, FAQ, and the accommodation request form.

## FAQ

- How much does the service cost? Free for students during the MVP phase.
- When will I hear back? A shortlist is aimed for within 24 hours of the request.
- How do you verify accommodations? Options are personally reviewed and only places we would send a student to are recommended.
- Do you visit accommodations? Yes, properties are visited and verified before recommendation.
- Can parents submit requests? Yes, parents can submit on behalf of their child.
- What universities do you support? Starting with universities in Islamabad, expanding over time.
